name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.6.7 GitHub remote diagnostics, safer git rm workflows, and clearer staging status badges
added: GitHub remote diagnostics: show remotes, current branch, upstream tracking, and remote access tests
Repository-not-found, missing-upstream, HTTPS authentication, and SSH key guidance after failed GitHub remote operations
Set upstream and push helper using git push -u origin HEAD
Safer file removal workflows: git rm for remove from Git and disk, git rm --cached for stop tracking while keeping the local file
Clear changed-file status badges such as [index:M work:-] and [index:- work:M] so staged/unstaged state changes are visible
next_recommended: Add GitHub CLI detection and optional gh repo create integration after explicit confirmation
Add pre-continue verification across all resolved candidate files
Add .gitignore suggestion after stop-tracking local config/log/build files
highlights: Remote diagnostics reduce confusion when GitHub repository creation, upstream tracking, or authentication is incomplete
git rm workflows separate deleting files from simply stopping Git tracking
Changed-file badges make staging results easier to see
